[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101000101 4
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 001101111 6
4 101011110 6
5 001000000 1
6 100010101 4
7 110001000 3

01 10 101111111 8
12 21 101011110 6 match 4
23 32 101010101 5
34 43 110011101 6
45 54 111011101 7
56 65 101111101 7
67 76 101101101 6
70 07 101101111 7

13 31 101011111 7
24 42 111001000 4
35 53 101011101 6
46 64 111101101 7

60 06 001101111 6 match 3
71 17 101011111 7

72 27 101000101 4 match 0
